arg.name: iid
arg.description: Delete an identification by identification ID.

arg.name: iid
arg.description: Rename an identification by identification ID.

arg.name: name
arg.description: The identification name. For example fingerprint 1, fingerprint 2, etc.

arg.name: identifications
arg.description: JSON array, each item is an object containing: "iid" (string, identification ID), "data_id" (string, the FeatureData.featureID), "name" (string, user-assigned name e.g. "fingerprint 1").

method.name: EnrollStart

arg.name: authtype
arg.description: The authentication type being or to be performed. Refer to enum AuthType in file kas-authentication-i.h.

arg.name: extra_info
arg.description: Additional information in JSON format. For UKey: {"ukey": {"pin": "<PIN>", "serial_number": "<serial>"}}. For biometric: pass "{}". This is forwarded to the device driver's EnrollStart method.

method.description: Start enrollment using the default device for the given auth type. The EnrollStatus signal will be emitted during the enrollment process.

arg.name: iid
arg.description: Identification ID, uniquely identifies the enrolled feature. It is only valid when isComplete is true and enrollment succeeded. Empty if enrollment failed or still in progress.

arg.name: isComplete
arg.description: Whether the enrollment process has completed (either success or failure). false means enrollment is still in progress.

arg.name: progress
arg.description: A number between 0 and 100 describing the enrollment progress.

arg.name: message
arg.description: Human-readable status description. Can be displayed to the user as progress or error information.

signal.name: IdentificationChanged

arg.name: iid
arg.description: The identification ID of the feature that was modified.

signal.description: Emitted when an identification's attribute (e.g. name) is changed.

signal.name: IdentificationAdded

arg.name: iid
arg.description: The identification ID of the newly enrolled feature.

signal.description: Emitted when a new feature is enrolled and added to the user's identifications.

signal.name: IdentificationDeleted

arg.name: iid
arg.description: The identification ID of the feature that was removed.

signal.description: Emitted when a feature is deleted from the user's identifications.
